creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #5)
Since I want to make sure acceleration is working, I run it without vsync. With vsync, as you state, I get 60 FPS.

The only issue was the presence of the llvm7 patch. I assumed that this was a -E issue and that's why I figured it was not relevant. I just thought I should mention it. Everything else was clean for both mesa and the video driver.

I will try it with drm-stable-kmod re-installed shortly.
